indication: Adjuvant treatment following complete resection and platinum-based chemotherapy for adult patients with non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) with a high risk of recurrence whose tumours have PD-L1 expression on >= 50% of tumour cells and who do not have EGFR mutant or ALK-positive mutations.
description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved atezolizumab 840 mg as a monotherapy for reimbursement as a treatment option for the adjuvant treatment following complete resection and platinum-baesd chemotherapy for adult patients with non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) with a high risk of recurrence whose tumors have PD-L1 expression on >= 50% of tumor cells and who do not have EGFR mutant or ALK-positive mutations.

document.name: Atezolizumab 840mg Monotherapy - 14 Day. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
document.description: Atezolizumab 840mg Monotherapy - 14 Day, 2025, version number 3, NCCP National SACT Regimen, NCCP, viewed 26/03/2026, https://healthservice.hse.ie/documents/6398/592_v3_Atezolizumab_840mg_Monotherapy_14_Day.pdf
